## Runtime.RuntimeVersion.scaleByFactor() method

Scales this version by a multiplicative factor.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleByFactor(factor: number, options?: IVersionScaleOptions): Result<IRuntimeScaledRecipeVersion>;
```
